name_en: The Dior Jolie Top Handle Mini Chain Bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Cruise Collection, featuring an elegant and practical design. Crafted from white lambskin with a woven pattern, the flap is accented with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beads. It includes one interior compartment for daily essentials. With double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain strap featuring leather and CD links with white resin beads, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, suitable for both casual and evening looks.
name_cn:
The Dior Jolie Top Handle Mini Chain Bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Cruise Collection, featuring an elegant and practical design. Crafted from white lambskin with a woven pattern, the flap is accented with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beads. It includes one interior compartment for daily essentials. With double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain strap featuring leather and CD links with white resin beads, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, suitable for both casual and evening looks.
Main material: Lambskin
Lining: Lambskin
Magnetic flap closure with CD buckle and white resin beads on the front
1 compartment
Double top leather handles
Adjustable, detachable chain with resin beads and leather strap
Made in Italy Dimensions: 18.5 x 13 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
Style number: S3123
